title: Mathematics Curriculum Developer and Teacher
description:
🚀 Join the Founding Team at Sirius Mathematics!


Are you passionate about teaching Mathematics and ready to make a real impact? Whether you're just starting your journey as a Mathematics tutor or you're an experienced educator looking for a fresh, dynamic environment — we want you on our team.


At Sirius Mathematics, we’re more than just a tuition centre. We’re a startup with big ambitions. As part of the well-established Brighter World Education Group (which includes renowned brands like Tien Hsia Language School, Morris Allen English, and Orange Tree Preschool), we combine startup agility with the backing of a major education network.


💼 About the Role – Curriculum Developer (Founding Team)
As part of our pioneering Research & Development team, you will:

  • Collaborate with our Curriculum Head to design and enhance teaching materials, worksheets, and assessments.
  • Develop innovative, student-friendly approaches to teaching key Math concepts.
  • Lead engaging weekly group classes and uphold a high standard of teaching and learning.
  • Contribute ideas on curriculum, marketing, and business strategies to grow the Sirius brand.


🌟 Why Join Us?

  • Be a founding member of a growing startup with the chance to shape its future.
  • Career progression opportunities — move into team leadership or business development as we scale.
  • Work with a passionate, mission-driven team focused on delivering real results for students.
  • Competitive salary, based on your qualifications and experience (the range shown is a guide and may vary).


🎯 What We're Looking For:

  • A Bachelor's degree from a reputable university.
  • At least 2 years of teaching experience, ideally with a strong focus on Primary and Secondary school Mathematics.
  • Solid knowledge of the PSLE and GCE O-Level/SEC Math syllabus.
  • Strong skills in crafting effective and engaging teaching materials.
  • A team player with energy, ideas, and a passion for education.
  • Must be available to work on weekends.


🕒 Working Schedule:

  • Monday & Tuesday: Off
  • Wednesday: 1:00pm – 8:30pm
  • Thursday: 12:30pm – 8:00pm
  • Friday: 1:00pm – 9:00pm
  • Saturday & Sunday: 8:45am – 6:30pm


✨ Ready to Make a Difference?
If you’re excited about inspiring students, developing high-quality educational content, and growing with a brand new team — join us at Sirius Mathematics. Help shape the future of Math education in Singapore!

📩 Apply now and be part of something extraordinary.

postedCompany.description:
Sirius Mathematics is a premier tuition centre specialising in Secondary School Mathematics. Our unwavering commitment is to deliver quality and comprehensive education for Secondary School students, ensuring focused expertise aligned with the current MOE syllabus.


At Sirius Mathematics, our approach goes beyond traditional teaching methods. We are dedicated to ensuring that students don't simply learn but genuinely understand mathematical concepts.
postedCompany.name: SIRIUS LEARNING CENTRE PTE. LTD.
